text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's nothing. I just have a little headache.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
They say that beauty brings misfortune, and that
has me worried...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky tries to play it off, but it's clear that
the headache is really bothering her.
